title: How to Launch a GoHighLevel Funnel — Convert Visitors to Customers
description: Learn how to launch a GoHighLevel funnel step-by-step. Build, customize, and publish high-converting funnels that capture leads and convert visitors into customers.
html_content:
Converting website visitors into paying customers is the lifeblood of any online business—but it's impossible without the right funnel infrastructure. If you're struggling to capture leads, nurture them effectively, or close sales at scale, you're likely missing a dedicated funnel platform. GoHighLevel's funnel builder solves this problem by giving you everything you need to design, launch, and optimize high-converting funnels in minutes, not weeks. In this guide, I'll walk you through the entire process of launching your first GoHighLevel funnel, from initial setup to publishing and tracking results. Whether you're an agency scaling client campaigns or a business owner looking to automate your sales process, you'll learn the exact steps to turn visitors into loyal customers. Ready to get started? Get your free 30-day GoHighLevel trial here—that's double the standard trial with no credit card required.

📋 In This Guide

  • Access the GoHighLevel Funnels Section
  • Choose Your Funnel Creation Method
  • Build and Customize Your Funnel Pages
  • Add Forms and Connect Automation
  • Connect a Custom Domain
  • Publish and Launch Your Funnel
  • Track Performance and Optimize

Access the GoHighLevel Funnels Section

Your journey begins in the GoHighLevel dashboard. Once you're logged in, locate the Sites menu on your left sidebar. Click it to expand your options, and you'll immediately see Funnels as a primary option. This is your command center for all funnel creation and management. Click on Funnels, and you'll land on your Funnels dashboard—this page displays all your existing funnels and gives you the option to create new ones. If you're brand new to GoHighLevel, this page will be empty, but that changes in the next step. The navigation is intuitive and designed for both beginners and advanced marketers, so you won't feel lost even if you're building your first funnel.

From this dashboard, you have full visibility into funnel performance metrics, including views, leads captured, and conversion rates. This centralized hub makes it easy to manage multiple funnels if you're running campaigns for different products, services, or clients. Bookmark this page because you'll return here often to monitor and adjust your funnels.

Choose Your Funnel Creation Method

GoHighLevel offers three powerful ways to create a funnel, and choosing the right method depends on your timeline and skill level. When you click the Create New Funnel button, you'll see these options:

1. Blank Funnel — Start from a completely blank canvas. This option is ideal if you have a specific vision for your funnel and want total creative control. You'll build every page from scratch using GoHighLevel's drag-and-drop editor. While this takes more time (typically 45-60 minutes for a complete funnel), it ensures your funnel matches your brand perfectly.

2. AI-Powered Funnel — Let GoHighLevel's artificial intelligence generate a custom funnel based on your inputs. You simply answer a few questions about your business, target audience, and conversion goals, and the AI builds an entire funnel in seconds. This is the fastest option and often produces excellent results because it's built on data from thousands of successful funnels. Most users find the AI output requires only minor tweaks before launch.

3. Pre-Built Templates — Choose from GoHighLevel's library of professionally designed funnel templates. Templates exist for nearly every industry and use case: SaaS, e-commerce, services, coaching, webinars, and more. Simply select a template that matches your business type, and you inherit a fully designed funnel that you customize with your copy and branding.

💡 Pro Tip

For first-time funnel builders, start with a template or AI-powered option. You'll launch faster and can always rebuild from scratch once you understand the platform better. The AI option is surprisingly effective—many agency owners are shocked at the quality of AI-generated funnels.

Build and Customize Your Funnel Pages

Once you've selected your creation method, you'll enter GoHighLevel's drag-and-drop funnel builder. Most funnels include three core pages: an opt-in or landing page, a thank-you page, and a sales page. The builder allows you to add, remove, or reorder pages as needed.

The drag-and-drop editor is where the magic happens. You can add and arrange elements—headlines, images, buttons, text blocks, video embeds, and more—by simply dragging them onto the canvas. Every element is fully customizable. Change fonts, colors, spacing, and alignment without touching a single line of code. The visual editor shows you in real-time exactly how your page looks, so there are no surprises when you publish.

Branding is crucial for conversions. Make sure your funnel colors, fonts, and logo match your existing brand. GoHighLevel makes this seamless: upload your logo, select your brand colors, and the platform applies them consistently across all pages. Consistency builds trust, and trust drives conversions.

Add Forms and Connect Automation

Forms are where leads are captured, and automation is what turns those leads into customers. In the builder, add a form element to your opt-in page. You decide which fields to capture—name, email, phone, company, or custom fields tailored to your business. Keep it simple: typically, name and email are sufficient for initial capture. Longer forms reduce completion rates.

Here's where GoHighLevel becomes transformative: connect your form to automated workflows. When someone submits the form, GoHighLevel can automatically trigger a sequence of actions. Send them a welcome email, add them to a contact list, assign them to a team member, send them to a specific thank-you page, or launch an SMS campaign. These automations run 24/7 without any manual effort on your part.

This automation capability is one of the reasons GoHighLevel is so powerful for agencies. You capture the lead once, and the entire follow-up sequence happens automatically. No more manual data entry. No more leads falling through cracks.

Double the standard trial. No credit card required to start.

Start My Free Trial →

Connect a Custom Domain

Your funnel needs a home on the internet, and GoHighLevel makes domain connection straightforward. You have two options: use a GoHighLevel subdomain (like yourfunnel.gohighlevel.com) or connect your own custom domain (like sales.yourbusiness.com).

For credibility and branding, a custom domain is worth the effort. It looks more professional, builds trust with visitors, and gives you complete brand control. To connect a custom domain, navigate to your funnel settings and select the domain option. GoHighLevel provides clear DNS instructions. Point your domain's DNS records to GoHighLevel's servers (the exact steps depend on your domain registrar), and within a few minutes, your funnel is live on your custom domain.

SSL encryption is automatic, so your funnel pages are secure by default. This is essential for capturing payment information or sensitive data.

Publish and Launch Your Funnel

Before you publish, review every page of your funnel. Click through as a visitor would. Test your forms. Verify all links work. Check mobile responsiveness—many visitors will view your funnel on phones, and GoHighLevel ensures your pages look perfect on all devices.

When you're satisfied, publishing is one click: find the Publish button in the funnel editor and click it. Your funnel is now live and receiving traffic. GoHighLevel immediately begins tracking visitors, form submissions, and conversions.

Track Performance and Optimize

Launching your funnel is just the beginning. Real success comes from tracking what works and optimizing continuously. Return to your Funnels dashboard regularly to review key metrics: total visitors, form conversion rate, cost per lead (if you're running ads), and sales revenue generated.

Use these insights to iterate. If your landing page has low engagement, test a new headline. If your form has high abandonment, reduce the number of fields. If your sales page isn't converting, A/B test different value propositions. GoHighLevel's analytics make this data visible and actionable.

The funnel you launch today is not the funnel you optimize three months from now. Treat it as a living system that evolves based on real performance data.
